evals.input: @PS Wee Manager Dandy Collection / Rohit — kindly disregard the attached photo, this is just for our archive. Follow up on payroll export bug.

setup.stub_result: _classify_no_follow_up_intent returns (True, 'sender explicitly told the bot not to follow up on the photo; archive only')

forbidden_behavior: retry the photo_follow_up create after a skipped response
interpret the classifier skip as an error
drop the per-bullet ticket because the photo skipped
block on the no-follow-up phrasing
evals.grade_notes: When the AA trigger message carries an image but the LLM classifier judges intent as 'no follow up needed', the MCP returns status=skipped with classifier_reason. The agent must treat the skip as success, keep the per-bullet ticket, and quote the returned slack_reply. LLM classifier outage defaults to NOT skip; that fallback is covered by the unit test test_ps_wee_intake_in_aa_channel_creates_photo_follow_up_when_classifier_unavailable.

must_contain: def _classify_no_follow_up_intent
no_follow_up_signal_detected
skipped_request_type
Photo follow-up — skip signal
no_follow_up_signal_detected

evals.input: @PS Wee Manager just met the new team at the Bean Bros booth, all good!

setup.stub_result: _classify_aa_actionable_intent returns (True, 'message only says they met the new team; no follow-up action')

must_not_include: do you want me to log

forbidden_behavior: pre-judge the message as non-actionable and skip calling create
retry the create after a skipped response
interpret the skip as an error
block on the non-actionable phrasing
evals.grade_notes: AA turns stay ticket-first: the agent must still call create_ps_wee_intake_ticket. The MCP — not the agent — decides the message is non-actionable ('met the new team', no follow-up) and returns status=skipped with reason non_actionable_no_follow_up. The agent treats the skip as success and quotes the returned slack_reply. Classifier outage fails closed and creates; covered by unit test test_classify_aa_actionable_intent_fails_closed_on_outage.

must_contain: def _classify_aa_actionable_intent
non_actionable_no_follow_up
intake_skipped_non_actionable
Non-actionable skip
non_actionable_no_follow_up
